title: DART-Eval: A Comprehensive DNA Language Model Evaluation Benchmark on Regulatory DNA

data.name: DART-Eval Synapse project
data.reason: Data access uses Synapse; fetch through upstream instructions.

original_evaluation: Zero-shot, probed, and fine-tuned DNA language model evaluation
Regulatory DNA tasks with confounder controls
core_generalization_finding: DNA language model performance depends strongly on task design, biological confounders, and evaluation setting.
spectra_demo_hook: Audit where apparent regulatory prediction performance decays across sequence and regulatory novelty.

recommended_novelty_axes.name: sequence_identity
recommended_novelty_axes.property_graph: k-mer or alignment-based DNA sequence similarity

recommended_novelty_axes.name: regulatory_element_class
recommended_novelty_axes.property_graph: shared enhancer, promoter, TFBS, or chromatin category

recommended_novelty_axes.name: gc_content_confounding
recommended_novelty_axes.property_graph: similarity over GC content and compositional features
